/home/runner/work/_temp/codeql_databases/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -z relro -z now -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/odin4_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libodin4.so.5 -o libodin4.so.5.1.1-ef8f688 CMakeFiles/odin4_shared.dir/src/odin4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odin4_shared.dir/src/core/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odin4_shared.dir/src/usb/usb_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odin4_shared.dir/src/firmware/firmware_package.cpp.o  /usr/local/lib/libcryptopp.a -lusb-1.0 liblz4_lib.a
